response.overview: Young bride Kenna James receives an audacious bachelorette party gift from her bridesmaids: a session with renowned female dominatrix Aiden Starr. Hesitant but reassured by her friends that it's merely playful fun, Kenna arrives at the appointment, unprepared for Aiden's commanding presence and voluptuous allure. The busty dominatrix takes her role seriously, guiding the nervous bride into an intense, first-time lesbian encounter with expert precision. As Aiden's dominant seduction intensifies, Kenna teeters on the edge of desire, torn between fidelity to her fiance and the irresistible pull of forbidden pleasure. Will Kenna succumb to the experienced dominatrix's provocative control
response.title: Dominating the Bride
